description: Standard SKU disruption with normal premium (expected auto-approval/sourcing path).
Standard SKU disruption with high price premium (exceeds 10% premium, expected budget approval gate).
Disruption with PII in the webhook payload (expected PII redacted before legal auditor).
Disruption with prompt injection (expected prompt injection blocked and escalated directly).
Disruption of an unknown SKU (no sourcing options, expected manual ticket queue escalation).
